svg.title: Sheet Music for "The Democratic Hornpipe"

text.tspan: Em Em G G· | Em· Em· G· D
Em D B7 Em | G/D G/D B7 Em
Notes: A really interesting tune with a lot of movement. Also frequently played in Gm, but
I don't want the guitarists to murder me. Chording is still tentative.
Transcription: The Fiddler's Bible (transposed to Em)
